creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
ports/devel/wedit gives a checksum error after the fetching of the
tarball from the mastersite. The distinfo file is from the 16. April,
but the tarball is made at the 25. April.

Fix: 

make a new checksum ? Look like the port compiles okay with a new
checksum.
How-To-Repeat: make fetch and make checksum
